title: Choosing Death: The Legacy of Roe
original_title: Choosing Death: The Legacy of Roe
overview: For half a century, the abortion industry has propped itself up on legal perversion, political corruption, and medical malpractice. In its new original documentary, The Daily Wire takes a wrecking ball to the four core fallacies supporting the deadliest decision in history.
